description: You are on-call for an integration engine. The channel 'ADT_State_Normalizer' is throwing errors because a sending facility is transmitting invalid state codes (e.g., 'XX', 'ZZ') that are not in the lookup map. Investigate the errors and modify the JavaScript transformer in the 'To_File' destination to handle unknown values by defaulting to 'UNKNOWN' instead of crashing. Redeploy the channel and reprocess all errored messages so that all messages are successfully delivered to /home/ga/normalized_adt/ with zero remaining errors.
